species: Ovaries were taken from five sexually mature amphipods: Gammarus fossarum, Gammarus pulex, Gammarus roeseli, Hyallela azteca and Parhyale hawaiensis.
tissue: Ovaries were taken from five sexually mature amphipods...
sample_source: The amphipods from the Gammarida infraorder were sampled from rivers in mid-eastern France.
sex: only ovaries from females at the end of their reproductive cycle were retrieved.
